content:
ITEM 12. SECURITY OWNERSHIP OF CERTAIN BENEFICIAL OWNERS AND MANAGEMENT AND RELATED SHAREHOLDER MATTERS
The information required by section 201(d) and Item 403 of Regulation S-K will be included under the headings “Equity Compensation Plan Information” and “Security Ownership of Certain Beneficial Owners and Management” in our definitive proxy statement for our [DATE_TIME] Annual Meeting of Shareholders, and such required information is incorporated herein by reference.
ITEM 13.
